name: aero323--hinihao-chinese-tutor
description: Proactive Chinese language tutor that delivers curated, real-world Mandarin learning content on a schedule. Use when: (1) User wants to learn or improve Chinese/Mandarin. (2) User asks for Chinese reading material, podcast, video, or song recommendations. (3) A scheduled lesson push is triggered via cron/heartbeat. (4) User says "中文课", "Chinese lesson", "teach me Chinese", "HiNiHao", or "learn Mandarin". Covers HSK 1-6 with authentic content from Chinese platforms.
